PortfolioState.title: Portfolio State
PortfolioState.description: The unified state containing all portfolio modules including profile, skills, services, projects, certificates, testimonials, blogs, messages, leads, bookings, and admin credentials.

profile.description: Ayman Saber personal details, links, and biographies

skills.description: Key tech stack items and skill levels

projects.description: Built projects with images, links, tags, and metrics

bookings.description: Client discovery calls and schedule bookings

adminCredentials.description: Admin login username and password credentials hash

/portfolio_data/{docId}.description: The collection holding secure portfolio state items, mirroring the server cached structures.
